head.title: Brief Forecast for all New Zealand

div.div:
www.metservice.com is currently unavailable so you have been redirected to our backup site www2.metservice.com.
This site contains all the safety critical information and includes MetService Severe Weather Watches and Warnings, MetService rain radar imagery and brief forecast information.
We are working to restore www.metservice.com as soon as we possibly can. You can also follow us on Facebook @MetService and Twitter @MetService

div.h1: Brief Forecast for all New Zealand
div.p: Periods of rain, mainly south of Kaitaia. Thunderstorms and localised downpours possible between Bay of Islands and Whangaparaoa. Rain easing over Auckland this evening.
Waikato and Bay of Plenty to Wellington including the central high country and Taranaki, also Wairarapa
Cloudy periods. Isolated showers in Gisborne and Wairoa clearing this afternoon.
Mostly cloudy with a few showers.

North Island: Rain easing to isolated showers over Northland. Fine elsewhere.
South Island: Showers about Fiordland and the south coast, clearing. Fine elsewhere.

North Island: Partly cloudy with isolated showers in the west. Fine in the east.
South Island: Rain in the south, with some heavy falls. Isolated showers in the north and southeast. Fine in the northeast.

North Island: Partly cloudy with isolated showers in the west. Fine in the east.
South Island: Rain in the west clearing to just a few showers in Fiordland. Isolated showers in the southeast clearing early.
Occasional showers. Strong southwesterlies, turning lighter northwesterly on Monday.

body.script: var gaJsHost = (("https:" == document.location.protocol) ? "https://ssl." : "http://www."); document.write(unescape("%3Cscript src='" + gaJsHost + "google-analytics.com/ga.js' type='text/javascript'%3E%3C/script%3E"));
